modal_gdpr_footer:
I agree with Fanatee's data usage policy.
Privacy Policy, Terms of Service
modal_gdpr_pls_accept_to_continue: You need to accept conditions in order to proceed
modal_gdpr_footer_android: I agree with Fanatee's data usage policy.
modal_gdpr_text_update:
We have updated our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.

Our goal is to provide you with a great gaming experience in a responsible way.

Please read the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy for more information.
manage_data_info_ios:
By using any of Fanatee's mobile applications, you may be subject to behaviorally targeted advertisements. You may opt-out of receiving such interest-based ads in our platforms as follows:

1. Reset your IDFA (the "Identifier for Advertisers")

By resetting your IDFA, all of the data related to interest-based ads arising out of the access to and usage of mobile applications in your device will be untraceable by advertisers -  and not only the data related exclusively to access to and usage of Fanatee's mobile applications. 
For resetting your IDFA, please follow the applicable steps:
For iOS running IOS 8 or higher, go to Settings > Select Privacy> Select Advertising > Enable the "Limit Ad Tracking" setting. Additional information available on Apple Support site /n<color=blue><u><link="https://support.apple.com">https://support.apple.com</link></u></color>

It's important to emphasize that Fanatee is not responsible for the features of your  IDFA. In case you have any doubts related to this, we strongly suggest that you get in touch with the provider of the operational system of mobile applications in your device.

2. Opt-out of specific advertisers (the "Identifier for Advertisers"):  

In case you no longer want to receive interest-based ads of specific advertisers, you may opt-out of such advertisers by accessing /n<color=blue><u><link="https://www.youradchoices.com">www.youradchoices.com</link></u></color>/n and/or /n<color=blue><u><link="https://www.networkadvertising.org">www.networkadvertising.org</link></u></color>.

Please note that the links above may not reach all Fanatee´s advertising partners and behaviorally targeted advertising may still be displayed to you. Therefore, the access to and usage of Fanatee's mobile applications may always subject you to behaviorally targeted advertisements.
 
3. Erase your Data:

In case you want that all your data related to Fanatee's mobile applications be erased, you may request so by clicking below. Please note that your access to the relevant application will be ceased, including your progress and account. Fanatee will request all of its partners to also erase your data - please note that such partners may be required to retain your data for other purposes. In any case, we recommend you to check our partners’ Privacy Policy and send a specific request to them.
manage_data_info_android:
By using any of Fanatee's mobile applications, you may be subject to behaviorally targeted advertisements. You may opt-out of receiving such interest-based ads in our platforms as follows:

1. Reset your Advertising ID (the "Identifier for Advertisers")

By resetting your Advertising ID, all of the data related to interest-based ads arising out of the access to and usage of mobile applications in your device will be untraceable by advertisers -  and not only the data related exclusively to access to and usage of Fanatee's mobile applications. For resetting your Advertising ID , please follow the applicable steps:

For Android devices with OS 2.2 or higher and Google Play Services 4.0 and higher, go to Settings > Google Settings App > Ads > Enable "opt out of interest-based advertising" or go to Settings > Google > Personal Info & privacy > Ads Settings > Enable "opt out of Ads Personalization". Make sure to click Reset Advertising ID.

It's important to emphasize that Fanatee is not responsible for the features of your  Advertising ID. In case you have any doubts related to this, we strongly suggest that you get in touch with the provider of the operational system of mobile applications in your device.

2. Opt-out of specific advertisers (the "Identifier for Advertisers"):  

In case you no longer want to receive interest-based ads of specific advertisers, you may opt-out of such advertisers by accessing /n<color=blue><u><link="https://www.youradchoices.com">www.youradchoices.com</link></u></color>/n and/or /n<color=blue><u><link="https://www.networkadvertising.org">www.networkadvertising.org</link></u></color>.

Please note that the links above may not reach all Fanatee´s advertising partners and behaviorally targeted advertising may still be displayed to you. Therefore, the access to and usage of Fanatee's mobile applications may always subject you to behaviorally targeted advertisements.
 
3. Erase your Data:

In case you want that all your data related to Fanatee's mobile applications be erased, you may request so by clicking below. Please note that your access to the relevant application will be ceased, including your progress and account. Fanatee will request all of its partners to also erase your data - please note that such partners may be required to retain your data for other purposes. In any case, we recommend you to check our partners’ Privacy Policy and send a specific request to them.
modal_gdpr_text:
Our goal is to provide you with a great gaming experience in a responsible way.

Please read the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy for more information.

gm_reminder_4_body: That every day, come rain or shine, there's a new Crossword and daily Password to play on CodyCross?!
